title: 宝塚記念の後に・革命に散る！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an upset! Meisho Doto has defeated T.M.
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The late-blooming Umamusume has tapped into
her potential and risen a winner!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... It is happening—the upheaval. I never
believed it truly possible.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella has run her blade through this prince's
back.
Stab!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Maria! Adieu!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Not that we've ever met!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I'm sorry, Opera O. I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Never you mind, Doto. The prince may have been slain, but I am the Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
One mere revolt is not enough to topple me.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The cause for today's failure is clear as day.
Right, Trainer?

They look around to see the other racers staring
Opera O down with malice in their eyes.

The number of racers who went after her is far
from normal. Being everyone's target is a huge
struggle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you see the burden that I bear? It has nothing
to do with you, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, what is your next move? Is it not time you
raised your banner for all to see?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Banner? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To show your true colors. Up to this point, the
two of us were on congenial terms.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But after this victory, is it not your intention to
declare yourself my eternal adversary?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If that is the case, I shall forever treat you as a
worthy foe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But with that respect also comes distance. I won't
be so cordial toward you any longer. That would
be rude for someone of your caliber.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Doto, what path will you run?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My path... Do I have to be your enemy?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I always wanted to run equally with you, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Does that mean... we can't be friends?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This is all so sudden... Ohh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, it seems your heart is not yet set. Very well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well, Doto. I have already declared that
I'm moving my pieces on the board toward the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have until then to consider whether or not
you wish to become my eternal adversary.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer.

Opera O turns and leaves the track without
batting an eye to the numerous hateful stares
aimed at her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A task yet remains for Doto, just as a task yet
remains for us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I cannot run like the Overlord whilst so heavily
assailed by the others. But how to solve the
issue...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, each race will be me
against the world, with every racer my enemy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time and time again, I will be forced to break
through the army of revolutionaries caroling La
Marseillaise.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Saw through that as well, did you? Of
course not. The path of a king is no cakewalk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As the Overlord, I have to surpass these walls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We have until fall to contemplate the difficulties.
With our heads put together, we will find a
solution, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall arrive at the Japan Cup with all the majesty
befitting a ruler for this nation!

It seems the attack on the Overlord that Grass
Wonder predicted has become a real threat.

I have to find a way to help her push through and
establish the foundation for her dynasty.
